title: Artificial intelligence agents need access, not secrets
excerpt: As agentic enterprises take shape, the identity equation is shifting
content_html:
For years, identity security has been designed to secure an organization's human users. But as agentic enterprises take shape, the identity equation is shifting. Artificial intelligence (AI) agents and AI-powered builders – software tools used to develop websites and applications without coding – are increasingly participating in how access is configured, governed and used.

Field CTO for EMEA at Ping Identity.

AI agents are effectively new digital employees, so organizations need a way to know they exist and control what they do throughout their lifecycle. They are becoming operators, helping to administer and secure identity environments through machine-native interfaces.

To add another layer of complexity, desktop agents and AI assistants are also beginning to interact with enterprise applications and resources on behalf of users.

For an agentic enterprise to succeed, these agents need trusted access to do useful work but should not be given direct exposure to secrets they have no meaningful reason to access. To achieve this, organizations need a unified, AI-first identity model, centered on end-to-end visibility, governance and controls which strike a balance between security and appropriate access.

AI agents are reshaping identity

AI has created a new category of digital identity. Like human employees, autonomous agents must be discoverable and managed and governed so organizations can understand what systems and data they can access and who is responsible for their actions.

Traditional identity and access management (IAM) systems relied on static, one-time verification methods in response to access requests made by humans. But in the agentic enterprise, requests also come from autonomous software acting on behalf of human users. Organizations therefore need to know exactly who or what is accessing a system continuously, and if they have the correct permissions to access given information.

At the same time, AI is increasingly managing identities and access. Machine-native interfaces allow agents to help manage human users’ access, troubleshoot issues and support security workflows. While these capabilities can help organizations cut costs and improve efficiency, they are only successful when strong access guardrails are put in place.

Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

AI has created a new category of digital identity. Like human employees, autonomous agents must be discoverable and managed and governed so organizations can understand what systems and data they can access and who is responsible for their actions.

Traditional identity and access management (IAM) systems relied on static, one-time verification methods in response to access requests made by humans. But in the agentic enterprise, requests also come from autonomous software acting on behalf of human users. Organizations therefore need to know exactly who or what is accessing a system continuously, and if they have the correct permissions to access given information.

At the same time, AI is increasingly managing identities and access. Machine-native interfaces allow agents to help manage human users’ access, troubleshoot issues and support security workflows. While these capabilities can help organizations cut costs and improve efficiency, they are only successful when strong access guardrails are put in place.

Building a unified identity model for AI

Mechanisms for securing AI cannot simply be bolted onto identity systems designed for humans. It requires a complete rethink of the identity management model, where human and machine identities are governed through a single framework to prevent tool sprawl and unintentional security blind spots.

As organizations adopt AI tools throughout multiple operational layers, enterprise identity needs to evolve and become easier to manage and automate. Identity can no longer rely solely on human administration.

Tools designed specifically for autonomous agents, such as AI-first headless interfaces, allow builders and AI alike to perform identity-related tasks. Autonomous operators must also be trained to configure access, troubleshoot workflows and apply governance controls within approved policies and guardrails.

Visibility and governance across the entire AI agent lifecycle are also critical. As more agents are deployed, businesses must have complete visibility into their agents and actions.

Every AI should be treated as a first-class identity, with a designated human owner, as well as clear policies and full auditability throughout its entire lifecycle. As these agents operate across the enterprise, their actions should be traceable to a human user responsible.

Finally, AI agents need trusted ways to interact with enterprise resources without being given direct access to the credentials or secrets that enable them. Coding and desktop agents increasingly interact with systems on behalf of users, but exposing them to credentials or long-lived secrets creates unnecessary risk. Instead, access to enterprise resources should be brokered through just-in-time privileged controls.

This allows enterprises to maintain oversight of how permissions are granted, governed and audited without exposing the underlying secrets behind that access. Together, these capabilities create a unified identity model which extends governance across human and AI identities without creating a parallel identity stack.

The future of the agentic enterprise

AI agents cannot operate as intended and deliver meaningful value without access to enterprise systems. But granting unrestricted access or exposing sensitive information creates an entirely new risk to organizations.

The future of the agentic enterprise depends on maintaining governance, visibility and control across both human and digital identities. This means identity must become programmable, AI agents should be governed throughout their lifecycle and agent access needs to be given without unnecessary exposure to sensitive data.

A unified identity strategy provides the means to operate AI agents more safely and efficiently while maintaining centralized governance, accountability and control.

We've featured the best endpoint security software.

This article was produced as part of TechRadar Pro Perspectives, our channel to feature the best and brightest minds in the technology industry today.

The views expressed here are those of the author and are not necessarily those of TechRadarPro or Future plc. If you are interested in contributing find out more here: https://www.techradar.com/pro/perspectives-how-to-submit

blocks.html_en: For years, identity security has been designed to secure an organization's human users. But as agentic enterprises take shape, the identity equation is shifting. Artificial intelligence (AI) agents and AI-powered builders – software tools used to develop websites and applications without coding – are increasingly participating in how access is configured, governed and used.

sentences.en: For years, identity security has been designed to secure an organization's human users.
sentences.zh: 多年来，身份安全一直旨在保护组织的人类用户。

sentences.en: But as agentic enterprises take shape, the identity equation is shifting.
sentences.zh: 但随着代理企业的形成，身份等式正在发生变化。

sentences.en: Artificial intelligence (AI) agents and AI-powered builders – software tools used to develop websites and applications without coding – are increasingly participating in how access is configured, governed and used.
sentences.zh: 人工智能 (AI) 代理和人工智能驱动的构建器（用于开发网站和应用程序而无需编码的软件工具）越来越多地参与访问的配置、管理和使用。

blocks.html_en: Field CTO for EMEA at Ping Identity.

sentences.en: Field CTO for EMEA at Ping Identity.
sentences.zh: Ping Identity 欧洲、中东和非洲地区首席技术官。

blocks.html_en: AI agents are effectively new digital employees, so organizations need a way to know they exist and control what they do throughout their lifecycle. They are becoming operators, helping to administer and secure identity environments through machine-native interfaces.

sentences.en: AI agents are effectively new digital employees, so organizations need a way to know they exist and control what they do throughout their lifecycle.
sentences.zh: 人工智能代理实际上是新的数字化员工，因此组织需要一种方法来了解它们的存在并控制它们在整个生命周期中所做的事情。

sentences.en: They are becoming operators, helping to administer and secure identity environments through machine-native interfaces.
sentences.zh: 他们正在成为运营商，通过机器本机接口帮助管理和保护身份环境。

blocks.html_en: To add another layer of complexity, desktop agents and AI assistants are also beginning to interact with enterprise applications and resources on behalf of users.

sentences.en: To add another layer of complexity, desktop agents and AI assistants are also beginning to interact with enterprise applications and resources on behalf of users.
sentences.zh: 为了增加另一层复杂性，桌面代理和人工智能助手也开始代表用户与企业应用程序和资源进行交互。

blocks.html_en: For an agentic enterprise to succeed, these agents need trusted access to do useful work but should not be given direct exposure to secrets they have no meaningful reason to access. To achieve this, organizations need a unified, AI-first identity model, centered on end-to-end visibility, governance and controls which strike a balance between security and appropriate access.

sentences.en: For an agentic enterprise to succeed, these agents need trusted access to do useful work but should not be given direct exposure to secrets they have no meaningful reason to access.
sentences.zh: 为了使代理企业取得成功，这些代理需要受信任的访问来完成有用的工作，但不应直接暴露他们没有有意义的理由访问的秘密。

sentences.en: To achieve this, organizations need a unified, AI-first identity model, centered on end-to-end visibility, governance and controls which strike a balance between security and appropriate access.
sentences.zh: 为了实现这一目标，组织需要一个统一的、人工智能优先的身份模型，以端到端可见性、治理和控制为中心，在安全性和适当访问之间取得平衡。

blocks.html_en: AI agents are reshaping identity

sentences.en: AI agents are reshaping identity
sentences.zh: 人工智能代理正在重塑身份

blocks.html_en: AI has created a new category of digital identity. Like human employees, autonomous agents must be discoverable and managed and governed so organizations can understand what systems and data they can access and who is responsible for their actions.

sentences.en: AI has created a new category of digital identity.
sentences.zh: 人工智能创造了一个新的数字身份类别。

sentences.en: Like human employees, autonomous agents must be discoverable and managed and governed so organizations can understand what systems and data they can access and who is responsible for their actions.
sentences.zh: 与人类员工一样，自主代理必须是可发现、可管理和治理的，以便组织能够了解他们可以访问哪些系统和数据以及谁对其行为负责。

But in the agentic enterprise, requests also come from autonomous software acting on behalf of human users. Organizations therefore need to know exactly who or what is accessing a system continuously, and if they have the correct permissions to access given information.

sentences.zh: 传统的身份和访问管理（IAM）系统依赖静态的一次性验证方法来响应人类发出的访问请求。

sentences.en: But in the agentic enterprise, requests also come from autonomous software acting on behalf of human users.
sentences.zh: 但在代理企业中，请求也来自代表人类用户的自主软件。

sentences.en: Organizations therefore need to know exactly who or what is accessing a system continuously, and if they have the correct permissions to access given information.
sentences.zh: 因此，组织需要准确地了解谁或什么正在连续访问系统，以及他们是否具有访问给定信息的正确权限。

blocks.html_en: At the same time, AI is increasingly managing identities and access. Machine-native interfaces allow agents to help manage human users’ access, troubleshoot issues and support security workflows. While these capabilities can help organizations cut costs and improve efficiency, they are only successful when strong access guardrails are put in place.

sentences.en: At the same time, AI is increasingly managing identities and access.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，人工智能越来越多地管理身份和访问。

sentences.en: Machine-native interfaces allow agents to help manage human users’ access, troubleshoot issues and support security workflows.
sentences.zh: 机器本机界面允许代理帮助管理人类用户的访问、解决问题并支持安全工作流程。

sentences.en: While these capabilities can help organizations cut costs and improve efficiency, they are only successful when strong access guardrails are put in place.
sentences.zh: 虽然这些功能可以帮助组织降低成本并提高效率，但只有在设置强大的访问护栏时它们才能成功。

blocks.html_en: Building a unified identity model for AI

sentences.en: Building a unified identity model for AI
sentences.zh: 为人工智能构建统一的身份模型

sentences.en: Mechanisms for securing AI cannot simply be bolted onto identity systems designed for humans.
sentences.zh: 确保人工智能安全的机制不能简单地固定在为人类设计的身份系统上。

sentences.en: It requires a complete rethink of the identity management model, where human and machine identities are governed through a single framework to prevent tool sprawl and unintentional security blind spots.
sentences.zh: 它需要对身份管理模型进行彻底的重新思考，其中人和机器身份通过单一框架进行管理，以防止工具蔓延和意外的安全盲点。

sentences.en: As organizations adopt AI tools throughout multiple operational layers, enterprise identity needs to evolve and become easier to manage and automate.
sentences.zh: 随着组织在多个运营层采用人工智能工具，企业身份需要不断发展并变得更易于管理和自动化。

sentences.en: Identity can no longer rely solely on human administration.
sentences.zh: 身份不能再仅仅依赖于人类管理。

sentences.en: Autonomous operators must also be trained to configure access, troubleshoot workflows and apply governance controls within approved policies and guardrails.
sentences.zh: 自主操作员还必须接受培训，以配置访问、排除工作流程故障并在批准的策略和护栏内应用治理控制。

sentences.en: Visibility and governance across the entire AI agent lifecycle are also critical.

sentences.en: As more agents are deployed, businesses must have complete visibility into their agents and actions.
sentences.zh: 随着部署更多代理，企业必须完全了解其代理和操作。

sentences.en: Every AI should be treated as a first-class identity, with a designated human owner, as well as clear policies and full auditability throughout its entire lifecycle.
sentences.zh: 每个人工智能都应被视为一流的身份，拥有指定的人类所有者，并在其整个生命周期中拥有明确的政策和全面的可审计性。

sentences.en: As these agents operate across the enterprise, their actions should be traceable to a human user responsible.
sentences.zh: 当这些代理在整个企业中运行时，他们的行为应该可以追溯到负责的人类用户。

blocks.html_en: Finally, AI agents need trusted ways to interact with enterprise resources without being given direct access to the credentials or secrets that enable them. Instead, access to enterprise resources should be brokered through just-in-time privileged controls.

sentences.en: Finally, AI agents need trusted ways to interact with enterprise resources without being given direct access to the credentials or secrets that enable them.
sentences.zh: 最后，人工智能代理需要以可信的方式与企业资源进行交互，而无需直接访问支持它们的凭证或秘密。

sentences.en: Coding and desktop agents increasingly interact with systems on behalf of users, but exposing them to credentials or long-lived secrets creates unnecessary risk.
sentences.zh: 编码和桌面代理越来越多地代表用户与系统进行交互，但将凭证或长期秘密暴露给他们会带来不必要的风险。

sentences.en: Instead, access to enterprise resources should be brokered through just-in-time privileged controls.
sentences.zh: 相反，对企业资源的访问应该通过及时的特权控制进行代理。

blocks.html_en: This allows enterprises to maintain oversight of how permissions are granted, governed and audited without exposing the underlying secrets behind that access. Together, these capabilities create a unified identity model which extends governance across human and AI identities without creating a parallel identity stack.

sentences.en: This allows enterprises to maintain oversight of how permissions are granted, governed and audited without exposing the underlying secrets behind that access.
sentences.zh: 这使得企业能够对如何授予、管理和审核权限进行监督，而不会暴露该访问背后的潜在秘密。

sentences.en: Together, these capabilities create a unified identity model which extends governance across human and AI identities without creating a parallel identity stack.
sentences.zh: 这些功能共同创建了一个统一的身份模型，可以扩展人类和人工智能身份的治理，而无需创建并行的身份堆栈。

blocks.html_en: The future of the agentic enterprise

sentences.en: The future of the agentic enterprise
sentences.zh: 代理企业的未来

blocks.html_en: AI agents cannot operate as intended and deliver meaningful value without access to enterprise systems. But granting unrestricted access or exposing sensitive information creates an entirely new risk to organizations.

sentences.en: AI agents cannot operate as intended and deliver meaningful value without access to enterprise systems.
sentences.zh: 如果不访问企业系统，人工智能代理就无法按预期运行并提供有意义的价值。

sentences.en: But granting unrestricted access or exposing sensitive information creates an entirely new risk to organizations.
sentences.zh: 但授予不受限制的访问权限或暴露敏感信息会给组织带来全新的风险。

blocks.html_en: The future of the agentic enterprise depends on maintaining governance, visibility and control across both human and digital identities. This means identity must become programmable, AI agents should be governed throughout their lifecycle and agent access needs to be given without unnecessary exposure to sensitive data.

sentences.en: The future of the agentic enterprise depends on maintaining governance, visibility and control across both human and digital identities.
sentences.zh: 代理企业的未来取决于维持人类和数字身份的治理、可见性和控制。

sentences.en: This means identity must become programmable, AI agents should be governed throughout their lifecycle and agent access needs to be given without unnecessary exposure to sensitive data.
sentences.zh: 这意味着身份必须变得可编程，人工智能代理应该在其整个生命周期中受到管理，并且需要在不不必要地暴露敏感数据的情况下授予代理访问权限。

blocks.html_en: A unified identity strategy provides the means to operate AI agents more safely and efficiently while maintaining centralized governance, accountability and control.

sentences.en: A unified identity strategy provides the means to operate AI agents more safely and efficiently while maintaining centralized governance, accountability and control.
sentences.zh: 统一的身份策略提供了更安全、更高效地操作人工智能代理的方法，同时保持集中治理、问责和控制。

content_html_zh:
多年来，身份安全一直旨在保护组织的人类用户。 但随着代理企业的形成，身份等式正在发生变化。 人工智能 (AI) 代理和人工智能驱动的构建器（用于开发网站和应用程序而无需编码的软件工具）越来越多地参与访问的配置、管理和使用。

Ping Identity 欧洲、中东和非洲地区首席技术官。

人工智能代理实际上是新的数字化员工，因此组织需要一种方法来了解它们的存在并控制它们在整个生命周期中所做的事情。 他们正在成为运营商，通过机器本机接口帮助管理和保护身份环境。

为了增加另一层复杂性，桌面代理和人工智能助手也开始代表用户与企业应用程序和资源进行交互。

为了使代理企业取得成功，这些代理需要受信任的访问来完成有用的工作，但不应直接暴露他们没有有意义的理由访问的秘密。 为了实现这一目标，组织需要一个统一的、人工智能优先的身份模型，以端到端可见性、治理和控制为中心，在安全性和适当访问之间取得平衡。

人工智能代理正在重塑身份

人工智能创造了一个新的数字身份类别。 与人类员工一样，自主代理必须是可发现、可管理和治理的，以便组织能够了解他们可以访问哪些系统和数据以及谁对其行为负责。

传统的身份和访问管理（IAM）系统依赖静态的一次性验证方法来响应人类发出的访问请求。 但在代理企业中，请求也来自代表人类用户的自主软件。 因此，组织需要准确地了解谁或什么正在连续访问系统，以及他们是否具有访问给定信息的正确权限。

与此同时，人工智能越来越多地管理身份和访问。 机器本机界面允许代理帮助管理人类用户的访问、解决问题并支持安全工作流程。 虽然这些功能可以帮助组织降低成本并提高效率，但只有在设置强大的访问护栏时它们才能成功。

订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

人工智能创造了一个新的数字身份类别。 与人类员工一样，自主代理必须是可发现、可管理和治理的，以便组织能够了解他们可以访问哪些系统和数据以及谁对其行为负责。

传统的身份和访问管理（IAM）系统依赖静态的一次性验证方法来响应人类发出的访问请求。 但在代理企业中，请求也来自代表人类用户的自主软件。 因此，组织需要准确地了解谁或什么正在连续访问系统，以及他们是否具有访问给定信息的正确权限。

与此同时，人工智能越来越多地管理身份和访问。 机器本机界面允许代理帮助管理人类用户的访问、解决问题并支持安全工作流程。 虽然这些功能可以帮助组织降低成本并提高效率，但只有在设置强大的访问护栏时它们才能成功。

为人工智能构建统一的身份模型

确保人工智能安全的机制不能简单地固定在为人类设计的身份系统上。 它需要对身份管理模型进行彻底的重新思考，其中人和机器身份通过单一框架进行管理，以防止工具蔓延和意外的安全盲点。

随着组织在多个运营层采用人工智能工具，企业身份需要不断发展并变得更易于管理和自动化。 身份不能再仅仅依赖于人类管理。

专为自主代理设计的工具（例如人工智能优先的无头界面）允许构建者和人工智能执行与身份相关的任务。 自主操作员还必须接受培训，以配置访问、排除工作流程故障并在批准的策略和护栏内应用治理控制。

整个人工智能代理生命周期的可见性和治理也至关重要。 随着部署更多代理，企业必须完全了解其代理和操作。

每个人工智能都应被视为一流的身份，拥有指定的人类所有者，并在其整个生命周期中拥有明确的政策和全面的可审计性。 当这些代理在整个企业中运行时，他们的行为应该可以追溯到负责的人类用户。

最后，人工智能代理需要以可信的方式与企业资源进行交互，而无需直接访问支持它们的凭证或秘密。 编码和桌面代理越来越多地代表用户与系统进行交互，但将凭证或长期秘密暴露给他们会带来不必要的风险。 相反，对企业资源的访问应该通过及时的特权控制进行代理。

这使得企业能够对如何授予、管理和审核权限进行监督，而不会暴露该访问背后的潜在秘密。 这些功能共同创建了一个统一的身份模型，可以扩展人类和人工智能身份的治理，而无需创建并行的身份堆栈。

代理企业的未来

如果不访问企业系统，人工智能代理就无法按预期运行并提供有意义的价值。 但授予不受限制的访问权限或暴露敏感信息会给组织带来全新的风险。

代理企业的未来取决于维持人类和数字身份的治理、可见性和控制。 这意味着身份必须变得可编程，人工智能代理应该在其整个生命周期中受到管理，并且需要在不不必要地暴露敏感数据的情况下授予代理访问权限。

统一的身份策略提供了更安全、更高效地操作人工智能代理的方法，同时保持集中治理、问责和控制。

我们提供了最好的端点安全软件。

本文是 TechRadar Pro Perspectives 的一部分，这是我们的频道，旨在介绍当今技术行业中最优秀、最聪明的人才。
